title: MuiExtraction
description: Structured metadata extracted from a Windows MUI (Multilingual User Interface) PE file. EXTRACTOR NOT YET IMPLEMENTED — this schema documents the expected output shape for future implementation.

mui_signature.description: Data from the MUI signature resource

language_id.description: LCID of the language this MUI file provides (e.g. 1033 for en-US)

service_checksum.description: Hex-encoded service checksum from MUI resource

resource_inventory.description: Count of each resource type present in the MUI file

parent_binary.description: Filename of the parent binary (derived by stripping .mui extension and language directory from filename)
